mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM AR_STA_ITEM a LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON a.ITEM_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON a.ITEM_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON a.ITEM_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON a.ITEM_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE 1=1
AND (a.ITEM_NO LIKE '%' || CAST(#{searchText} AS VARCHAR2(255)) || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || CAST(#{searchText} AS VARCHAR2(255)) || '%')
ORDER BY a.ORDERNO, a.ITEM_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE AR_STA_ITEM SET UNIT = #{unit}, DATATYPE = #{datatype}, STA_ITEM_ID = #{staItemId}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, ORDERNO = #{orderno}, SHOW_YN = #{showYn}, SHOW_ORDER = #{showOrder}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}
